case_title: CALIFORNIA RECORDING INSTITUTE VS ROGERS, STEVE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY CALIFORNIA RECORDING INSTITUTE AS TO DEFENDANT ROGERS, STEVE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-14-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
